creator: yokota@zodiac.mech.utsunomiya-u.ac.jp
text:
Hello. 

In December you reported problems with the `psm' driver and `moused'
in the FreeBSD 3.0-CURRENT running on HP Vectra VL. Since then,
problems similar to yours have been reported and fixed. I wonder if
these recent fix also cured your difficulty.

The most possible versions of FreeBSD which may have solved your
problem are 2.2-GAMMA, 3.0-SNAPs (970124 or later) and -current. If
you have tried one of these, would you please tell me success/failure? 
If found no problem, I would close your PR. If you still have the
problem, apparently I need to find a fix for the psm driver (possibly 
with your help).

Kazu, the current psm driver hacker :-)
